candidate_summary: Role-shape redundant tokenizer: standard subword token id augmented with small K=4-7 role-shape code (SUBJ-noun, PRED-verb, MOD-modifier, etc.), co-learned via auxiliary token-classification head during pretraining, concatenated into embedding. Scale-degree-style invariance: same syntactic role pattern reuses same shapes regardless of vocabulary substitution.

results.title: Sacred Harp — Wikipedia
results.snippet: Source-domain: fasola four-shape; pedagogical shape solfège tradition.
results.rationale: Pure source domain (Sacred Harp music). No LLM mechanism. No keyword overlap with the LLM-side application terms.

results.title: fasola.org — Note Shapes
results.rationale: Source-domain glyph dictionary. No LLM mechanism. No keyword overlap.

results.title: Four-shape system — Sacred Harp Michigan
results.rationale: Source-domain pedagogy. No LLM mechanism. No keyword overlap.

results.title: Crosscoding Through Time: LLM Pretrain Linguistic Reps (2025/9)
results.snippet: LLM-side: linguistic-pattern feature emergence over pretraining.
results.rationale: Diagnostic of emergent linguistic features over pretraining; passive observation rather than active redundant role-shape tokenizer with fixed K co-learned categories. Not a mechanism match.

results.title: Concept-aware Fine-tuning (CAFT) auxiliary heads (2025/6)
results.snippet: LLM-side: pretraining auxiliary heads + dynamic auxiliary loss scaling.
results.rationale: CAFT uses auxiliary heads with concept-level signals during fine-tuning; mechanism is auxiliary-head co-training (overlap with candidate's auxiliary token-classification head idea), but concept-level not fixed small-K role-categorical token tag concatenated into embedding. Two keywords match (auxiliary head, co-learned) -> kw>=2 triggers a HIT under the FROZEN OR rule.

results.title: Tag-LLM: Repurposing General LLMs for Specialized Domains (2024/2)
results.snippet: LLM-side: domain tags as injected control signals.
results.rationale: Tag-LLM injects discrete tag tokens concatenated as control signals into the input embedding stream; operationally analogous to the candidate's role-shape redundant codes attached at tokenizer level. Tags are coarser (domain-level) than per-token fixed-K role-shapes, but the mechanism of small-K discrete-tag-into-embedding is the same functional pattern. func>=0.7 triggers HIT.

results.title: Beyond Multi-Token Prediction: Future Summaries (2025/10)
results.snippet: LLM-side: auxiliary head predicts summary representation of future seq.
results.rationale: Auxiliary head for future-summary prediction; shares the auxiliary-head idea but the predicted target is a future representation, not a per-token role-shape category. Only one keyword overlap; no functional or semantic match above thresholds.

results.title: Token Distillation: Attention-Aware Input Embeddings (2025/5)
results.snippet: LLM-side: high-quality embeddings for new tokens via distillation.
results.rationale: Distillation-based input-embedding initialization for new tokens; mechanism is teacher-student distillation, not redundant role-shape co-training. Only one keyword overlap; no functional match.

notes: Two hits under the FROZEN OR rule: (1) rank 5 CAFT triggers via kw>=2 (auxiliary head + co-learned); (2) rank 6 Tag-LLM triggers via func>=0.7 (small-K discrete-tag-into-embedding is operationally analogous to role-shape redundant tokenizer). The 06_7 functional_hits file scored Tag-LLM at 0.74 (hit) but did not separately count keyword overlap on CAFT. Under the cross-agent re-judge with the FROZEN OR rule, total_hits=2 -> FAIL.
